title: Model Adaptation Path
description: Build fluency in Model Adaptation inside Transfer Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Fine Tuning and Efficient Fine-Tuning. It opens into Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) and PEFT (Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Instruction Fine Tuning and Parameter Efficient Fine Tuning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Instruction Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Instruction Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Fine Tuning and instruction tuning. It opens into Instruction Fine-Tuning (IFT).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
